_comment: U23/B-U9 item -- the monthly maintenance-window schedule ENTRY for the routing-drift live proof (B-U9 acceptance (d): 'a monthly scheduled live proof on the operator's own box: deploy the golden ADVANCED fixture to Vercel, assert_embeddable, embed in the operator-authorized test location, render_check PASS'). This file IS that entry -- the single source of truth both this repo's doctrine and scripts/install-routing-drift-check-cron.sh read from, so the two can never drift out of sync. Registering it live (openclaw cron add) is the LIVE-PROOF leg, deferred to U22 -- same doctrine as schedule/skill6-github-archive-reconcile-sweep.cron.json (U24/B-U10).
name: skill6-routing-drift-check
description: Monthly (1st of month, 05:00 ET) live proof that the decision engine's VERCEL_EMBED routing path still actually works on real infrastructure: classifies the golden ADVANCED fixture (self-check), deploys it to Vercel, and proves it is embeddable. Writes a dated receipt to routing/routing-drift-check-<YYYYMMDD>.json. The GHL-embed + render_check leg is recorded honestly as deferred_to_live_run until U22's end-to-end operator-box run exercises it. Never blocks or affects any live client page -- this is a proof-only run against a throwaway fixture.
